messages.content: Help me write a Rust function to parse command-line arguments using clap
How do I add optional arguments?

Use `Option<T>` for optional arguments:

```rust
#[derive(Parser, Debug)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(short, long)]
    name: String,
    
    #[arg(short, long, default_value = "1")]
    count: u32,
    
    #[arg(short, long)]
    optional: Option<String>,
}
```

Now `optional` will be `None` if not provided.
